personal.name: Shalmoly
personal.title: Data Engineer
personal.bio: I'm Shalmoly, a Data Engineer building scalable data pipelines and analytics platforms.

about.intro: I'm Shalmoly, a Data Engineer building scalable data pipelines and analytics platforms.
about.description: I'm currently working on building robust data infrastructure and real-time analytics systems. I have a passion for transforming raw data into actionable insights and building systems that scale. Always had a thing for open-source, I contribute to various data engineering projects.

currentlyWorkingOn.title: Real-time Analytics Platform
currentlyWorkingOn.description: Building a scalable real-time data processing system using Apache Kafka and Spark

currentlyWorkingOn.title: Data Pipeline Orchestration
currentlyWorkingOn.description: Designing and implementing ETL pipelines with Airflow and dbt

experience.description: Building scalable data pipelines and analytics platforms using Python and Microsoft SQL Server.

Delivering lectures and tutorials for undergraduate and postgraduate courses in IoT, data visualization, programming, big data, and computer systems. Supervising postgraduate research projects in IoT, data science, and big data, providing guidance and mentorship to students throughout the research process.

Conducted in-depth analysis of IoT sensor data to optimize air quality monitoring systems. Designed and developed wire frame prototypes for monitoring building sensor systems. Created interactive dashboards to visualize air quality trends and patterns.
Developed AI-driven solutions for real-time detection of bicycle lanes using computer vision techniques to improve road safety for cyclists, particularly in low-visibility nighttime conditions.

Conceptualized and implemented a framework for efficient and scalable data generation tailored to IoT applications. Developed research prototypes and Proof-of-Concept models to validate hypotheses and derive data-driven insights. Analyzed large-scale IoT data to identify trends, uncover patterns and improve forecasting accuracy. Published research findings in peer-reviewed journals and presented at international conferences. Mentored research projects, ensuring successful execution and impactful outcomes.

Led SQL development initiatives for Oracle APPS, focusing on ERP system optimization and enhancement. Spearheaded the creation of technical and functional documentation to streamline project requirements and ensure alignment with business objectives. Drove cross-functional collaboration with stakeholders, delivering high-quality solutions while ensuring adherence to timelines and project goals.

Implemented a face recognition system, utilizing eigenface and distance classifier, and achieved an accuracy of 93.33%. Authored and published work in peer-reviewed journals and international conferences showcasing the research findings and contributions in the field.

research.description: My research comprised of various projects in transportation and manufacturing domain which involved analyzing large, complex sensor data sets to uncover meaningful patterns. I also explored the application of machine learning models for object detection, to better understand and improve real-world processes.
